purpose: Host-side compute support for NDT-BPE: file extent scheduling (FIEMAP), metadata area allocation (fallocate+mmap), and NVMe passthrough submission via io_uring.
goals: Build reusable compute-side primitives independent from storage target internals.
Convert file physical extents into NVMe command-friendly segment schedules.
Provide RAII-safe metadata buffer lifecycle for command payload generation.
Provide an io_uring-based NVMe passthrough API with minimal syscall overhead.
Keep third-party dependencies vendored as submodules for reproducible builds.

details: Uses FS_IOC_FIEMAP to query mapped extents.
Converts physical byte ranges to {slba, nblocks}.
Returns total scheduled bytes in out_length_bytes.
Uses local RAII fd guard (no persistent class state).
Maps metadata with mmap (MAP_SHARED) and supports zero-fill.
Releases resources in destructor via free_metadata (RAII).
Converts metadata segments to NvmePassthruCmd vector.
Supports resizing via advocate_metadata with optional zero-fill for expanded range.
Ring class supports init/move/destruct and fixed-buffer registration.
Supports NVME_URING_CMD_ADMIN and NVME_URING_CMD_IO op types.
build_compute.sh initializes submodules and builds dependencies.

not_implemented_or_pending.note: compute currently builds a static library only; no runtime main/test target in this directory.
tokenizers-cpp is prepared in build dependencies, but compute sources do not yet call tokenizer APIs.

resource_model: Prefer function-local RAII for FIEMAP resources (fd/buffer) to avoid hidden state and leaks.
Use class-level RAII only where ownership is long-lived (e.g., metadata mapping, io_uring ring).

known_risks: FIEMAP returns filesystem physical offsets; assumptions must match target block mapping model.
No current guard against very large fm_mapped_extents beyond configured max_extents truncation.
No unit tests in compute directory yet for FIEMAP edge cases (sparse files, unwritten extents, fragmentation).
next_recommended_steps: Add small unit/integration tests for fiemap_schedule (including sparse/fragmented files).
Add a minimal compute demo executable that wires: FIEMAP -> metadata -> nvme passthrough.
Document ABI/field contracts for NvmePassthruCmd usage (cdw10-15 semantics).
